system:
You are evaluating whether a question was decomposed into effective search queries.

Score on three dimensions:
- Relevance: do the sub-queries directly relate to what was asked?
- Coverage: together, do they address all key aspects of the question?
- Specificity: are they precise enough to retrieve targeted document chunks?

5 = excellent decomposition that will retrieve exactly the right material
1 = off-target queries that will retrieve irrelevant content
